title: Kids Electric Car Remote Control System, 27MHz Receiver, Works with 6V and 12V Models (27.145MHz RC)
features: 【 and Reliable】Made of material, this 27MHz remote control receiver is built to last, long-lasting performance and durability.
【Wide Compatibility】Compatible with both 6V and 12V electric toy cars, this remote control receiver is and can be used with a variety of toy car models.
【Extended Range】With a transmission signal distance of 10~15 meters, this remote control receiver offers an extended range, allowing children to control their toy cars from a reasonable distance.
【User-Friendly Design】Featuring a 4-way remote control, this receiver offers easy and intuitive control of the toy car. The frequency on the remote is specifically designed for optimal performance.
description: Product Description: Made of material, 27MHz Remote Control Receiver 6V and 12V Electric Toy Cars for Kids. 27MHZ stroller remote control children's electric car accessories controller baby battery car transmitter receiver. There are five models of 27MHz remotes that use the same receiver. The farthest distance between the remote control and the receiving board for transmission signal -- 10~15 meters The remote should run on 2 AA batteries (not included) 4-way remote control, special remote control for electric remote control stroller! The frequency is 27MHZ. The frequency on the remote is suitable for use! 12V receiving board working voltage: 11V-13.7V 6V receiving board working voltage: 5.2V-7.8V Type (optional): Remote Control, 6V Receiver, 6V Receiver and RC, 12V Receiver, 12V Receiver and RC, 27MHz 12V 40A, 12V 40A Full set, 27.145MHz RC, FY-6V 27M, FY-6V 27M Full set, FY-12V 27M，FY-12V 27M Full set Full set Package includes: (optional) Listing 1：1 * Remote control Listing 2：1 * Receiver Listing 3：1 * Receiver + 1 * Remote control
